notes:
Batch 16 is drawn entirely from the MrPankow 6B/6C P/S cloze deck (all 257 cards are AACloze notes) and is in excellent structural shape: every {{cN::...}} deletion is balanced and well-formed, each revealed answer correctly corresponds to its blanked front, and there are no empty answers, no unrendered template artifacts ('{{', '}}', 'FrontSide'), and no LaTeX/MathJax (so delimiter checks are not applicable). The embedded HTML (deeply nested
//// plus  /> entities and tags) is messy but consistently balanced, and image-bearing cards always retain usable cloze text. The only flagged items are two cosmetic split-word artifacts ('compreh end') on note 1590817290222; numerous content-level spelling typos exist throughout (e.g., 'duel coding', 'declerative', 'Conjuction', 'Accomodation') but they remain readable/studyable and are out of scope for these structural checks.
